pi_items.source: Web search confirmed latitude, longitude, and elevation values reflect real-world university locations. West longitudes are correctly negated in decimal degrees.
Web search verified NORAD IDs for ISS (ZARYA), SO-50, AO-85, and AO-95. The IDs were also confirmed to exist in the provided TLE files (amateur.txt and stations.txt).
Task instruction explicitly requests setting CU_Boulder as the default ground station. The standard file format for ground station configurations is .qth.
Task instructions explicitly state 'Configure GPredict to display UTC time (not local time) for all timestamps.'

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the coordinates for CU Boulder (40.0076N, -105.2659W, 1624m), CSU Fort Collins (40.5734N, -105.0865W, 1525m), and Mines Golden (39.7514N, -105.2225W, 1729m) match their real-world locations. Verified the exact NORAD IDs for ISS (ZARYA) [25544], SO-50 (SaudiSat 1C) [27607], AO-85 (Fox-1A) [40967], and AO-95 (Fox-1Cliff) [43770] via public satellite catalogs, and confirmed these IDs are present in the provided amateur.txt and stations.txt files. Verified the required system default station and UTC settings align precisely with explicit instructions.
